title: Thicc Netherite weapons
description: Adds a thicc Netherite Sword and Axe
body:
This mod adds a thicc Netherite sword and a thicc Netherite axe.

They are crafted in the smithing table with the normal Netherite tool, a Netherite block and a Netherstar.

The Sword deals 22 damage and has a durability of 5000, but gives slowness 1 for 0.5sec when swinging. The entity that got hit gets slowness 1 for 1sec.

The Axe deals 25 damage and has a durability of 5000, but gives slowness 1 when held in hand and slowness 2 for 0.5sec when swinging. The entity that got hit gets slowness 2 for 1sec.

They also have the same enchantability as gold tools.
